name: Semedrian Smith
subject: what's on your mind before Election Day?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | There are 30 days left in this election, Peter. We can see the finish line from here. And as we head into the final month, we wanted to take a moment to get your thoughts. **Reply to this message with your thoughts, concerns, or suggestions for the campaign!** When we send messages to you, we try to cover a range of topics. News that's changing in the race. Updates on the latest issues Sherrod is working on. Opportunities for you to help Team Sherrod by sharing news on social media, signing petitions, or chipping in a few dollars. But maybe we're missing something you'd like to see. Maybe there's something you'd like to see more of from us. Maybe you just have a few ideas you'd like us to pass on to Sherrod. **Whatever your thoughts, we want to hear them. Click "reply" and let us know what's on your mind.** Thanks! Semedrian Semedrian Smith
Deputy Campaign Manager
---

|

**NH REPUBLICAN PARTY**
**WEEKLY NEWSLETTER**
**SUNDAY, OCTOBER 7th**
|
---
**_A Note From Wayne_**
Dear Derek,
What a great week, in New Hampshire and nationally, for Republicans!
Our enthusiasm is up! Justice Kavanaugh has been confirmed and Republican activists are flocking to campaign and victory offices across the state to get Republicans elected.
We're working hard on getting our candidates to the finish line, everyone is working hard and things are coming together well.
On Thursday night, energized Republicans in Derry attended their Wine and Cheese event, building support for the Derry Republican team.
Also on Thursday, Senate President Chuck Morse hosted his annual Harvest Fest at the Atkinson Country Club. The packed room of people, excited to get President Morse another two years with the Senate gavel, was joined by Senate Majority Leader Jeb Bradley, Governor Chris Sununu and Senator Kelly Ayotte.
Republicans were excited to hear from these great speakers, and it was clear from the room which side has momentum going into the final stretch: ours.
In 30 days, we are going to re-elect Chris Sununu, send expanded majorities to the State House, Senate and Executive Council and send Eddie Edwards and Steve Negron to Washington, D.C.
All Democrats have to offer voters is obstruction and resistance. We saw what they were willing to do to defeat a qualified jurist from getting a seat on the Supreme Court. As President Trump said at his rally in Kansas last night, the Democrats are not behaving like a party we can trust with power in this country.
Sincerely,
Wayne MacDonald

clean_body: | | nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER SUNDAY, OCTOBER 7th | A Note From Wayne Dear Derek, What a great week, in New Hampshire and nationally, for Republicans! Our enthusiasm is up! Justice Kavanaugh has been confirmed and Republican activists are flocking to campaign and victory offices across the state to get Republicans elected. We're working hard on getting our candidates to the finish line, everyone is working hard and things are coming together well. On Thursday night, energized Republicans in Derry attended their Wine and Cheese event, building support for the Derry Republican team. Also on Thursday, Senate President Chuck Morse hosted his annual Harvest Fest at the Atkinson Country Club. The packed room of people, excited to get President Morse another two years with the Senate gavel, was joined by Senate Majority Leader Jeb Bradley, Governor Chris Sununu and Senator Kelly Ayotte. Republicans were excited to hear from these great speakers, and it was clear from the room which side has momentum going into the final stretch: ours. In 30 days, we are going to re-elect Chris Sununu, send expanded majorities to the State House, Senate and Executive Council and send Eddie Edwards and Steve Negron to Washington, D.C. All Democrats have to offer voters is obstruction and resistance. We saw what they were willing to do to defeat a qualified jurist from getting a seat on the Supreme Court. As President Trump said at his rally in Kansas last night, the Democrats are not behaving like a party we can trust with power in this country. Sincerely, Wayne MacDonald Join the Grassroots Circle! The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. Intern with the NH GOP! Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics? ** Learn the skills necessary to win elections and meet the Republican leaders that govern our State and write legislation. NH.GOP/LEADRIGHT EVENT SPOTLIGHT NHGOP PRESS THIS WEEK PHOTO OF THE WEEK The packed crowd at Senate President Chuck Morse's Harvest Fest this past Thursday night! REPUBLICAN SPOTLIGHT Our spotlight this week shines on the Derry Republican Committee! They had a wonderful Wine and Cheese Social this week, organized by Vice Chairman Jodi Nelson! name: Team O'Halleran
subject: where's Wendy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
Wendy Rogers claims that she wants to represent Arizonans in Congress. Well, she's already off to a pretty bad start.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633ebc/1a8421e1/19a5654cf/4936b1e7/3689927674/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Team, Wendy Rogers claims that she wants to represent Arizonans in Congress. Well, she's already off to a pretty bad start. Yesterday, Rogers had the opportunity to engage in an important discussion about the future of our district at a debate with Tom, hosted by InMaricopa.com. **But, shocker, she didn 't want to take questions about her extreme record (like her opposition to Social Security) --_so she skipped it, and Tom debated an empty chair._** Team, the choice in this race is clear: Tom is an independent voice fighting for our district, but Rogers doesn't even bother to show up. We must defeat her in November. [**Can you make a donation right here, right now, so we can re-elect Tom and keep AZ-01 blue?**](http://action.tomohalleran. Here at Team O'Halleran, we're proud to stand with Tom because he doesn't shy away from tough questions or tough votes -- he does what's right for our communities, no matter what. He's accountable and independent and the voice we need representing us in Washington.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Linda_S=C3=A1nchez?=
subject: We're still here -- and we're not backing down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
body:
Help me break the Republican majority. [](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_181007_Kavanaugh_EM&&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Peter --

Well, they did it. They really did it. Brett Kavanaugh has been appointed to the Supreme Court of the United States.

They didn't care about his deeply partisan background, working for George W. Bush during the Florida recount. They didn't care about his reference to birth control as "abortion-inducing drugs". And they **clearly** didn't care about Dr. Christine Blasey Ford's credible allegations of sexual assault.

We can never count on a Republican majority to do the right thing. So let's do something about it. [**Please donate to help our fight to flip the House in 30 days >>**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?refcode=RTW_181007_Kavanaugh_EM&&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

The first step to holding the President, Brett Kavanaugh, Mitch McConnell, and the rest of the Republicans in Washington accountable is to take back the House. That's why I've been helping seven Democratic challengers all across our state for the past months.

I've been mad since three million Americans were left voiceless in 2016. But what I'm feeling now, I haven't felt since that night in early November. This is NOT normal. [**I 'm determined to turn my anger into action. Will you join me?**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?refcode=RTW_181007_Kavanaugh_EM&&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

If you're afraid that Brett Kavanaugh will rule against the environment, against our future and that of our children, then I need you with me.

If you're afraid that Brett Kavanaugh will rule for the big financial companies over all of us, I need you with me.

If you're afraid Brett Kavanaugh will rule against victims of domestic assault, I need you to keep standing with me.

If you're afraid Brett Kavanaugh will rule against the Affordable Care Act, against Roe v. Wade, against everything that you and I hold dear, [**then I need your support so I can continue to aid remarkable Democratic challengers in California that will help us flip the House >>**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?refcode=RTW_181007_Kavanaugh_EM&&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

It's more important now than ever. Let's do this, together.

-Linda

**Rep. Linda S anchez proudly serves the 38th District of California. She is the fifth-highest ranking member of Leadership as the Vice Chair of the House Democratic Caucus and is the highest-ranking Latina in Congress. As a mother, union member, and progressive, Linda will always fight for America's working families.** **[CONTRIBUTE](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_181007_Kavanaugh_EM&&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
---

You can contribute to The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez by [**donating here.**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036687/4ac3d62d/6a2f9f81/1ce294db/1020533938/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ls_support?refcode=footer&amount=25.00&recurring=auto")
Contributions or gifts to The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez are not tax deductible.

You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. Still support Linda but want fewer emails? **[Go here](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036687/4ac3d62d/6a2f9f81/1ce294d8/1020533938/VEsB/ "https://secure.voteforlinda.com/page/signup/linda-sanchez-lite")** to sign up to receive less email from our campaign. [**Click here**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036687/4ac3d62d/6a2f9f81/1ce294d9/1020533938/VEsO/ "http://ca.voteforlinda.com/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages and enter dpwillis67@gmail.com so we can unsubscribe you from our list.

Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
PO Box 59660
Norwalk, CA 90652
---

name: Congressman Ted Deutch
subject: Exactly what our state needs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/jgjyJHH8QMCY_68rGQzILc0Shb_XnLpu-uhZsmEnSHQ=/7rEAjZCX3dTk3PX7GTl-_Nl2Fjk616ts4-sr0DAcqG0=) Friends and Neighbors -- Democratic leaders from across Florida are embracing former State Senator Jeremy Ring in his bid to be our next Chief Financial Officer. **I am proud to tell you - I 'm one of them.** You may not hear about the CFO all that often. But they have a very important job. Our CFO is the person who makes sure your hard-earned tax payer money is being spent how it is supposed to be spent. They ensure that the contracts the state signs are being executed as promised. And they are a crucial check and balance to the Governor and the Tallahassee Republicans, as well as to President Trump and the Washington GOP. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/jgjyJHH8QMCY_68rGQzILc0Shb_XnLpu-uhZsmEnSHQ=/dSwmAFXoikA5oIBIHzJasINABOOYpcXtmZmtEpmiMds=?am=25&) I've gotten to know Jeremy over the years as both a colleague and friend. His business background and innovative ideas are exactly what our state needs \- and his record of protecting the Florida retirement system is exactly what taxpayers deserve from their next CFO. But we have to get him elected first. And to do that, we need your help. [Contribute $25 Today >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/jgjyJHH8QMCY_68rGQzILc0Shb_XnLpu-uhZsmEnSHQ=/dSwmAFXoikA5oIBIHzJasINABOOYpcXtmZmtEpmiMds=?am=25&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) Thank you for all you do. **\- Ted** _P.S. Please forward this email to your friends and family so they are aware of this very important statewide race!_ | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2533690/14857808/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTk5M2MzNy0wNWNiLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0wMDBkM2ExMzMxOWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=38FwKKmBSjWr1-cLF9MWAjcqY_ERwJqJV5AjHQX11lc=)
Join our team! [Volunteer](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2533691/14857809/-1214481066?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTk5M2MzNy0wNWNiLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0wMDBkM2ExMzMxOWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=38FwKKmBSjWr1-cLF9MWAjcqY_ERwJqJV5AjHQX11lc=) or [donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2533692/14857810/1664269967?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTk5M2MzNy0wNWNiLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0wMDBkM2ExMzMxOWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=38FwKKmBSjWr1-cLF9MWAjcqY_ERwJqJV5AjHQX11lc=).
---
Peter,

How about some good news? We've got some to share! Today, **[we launched a new video featuring an endorsement from Dolores Huerta](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2533693/14857811/-803653937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTk5M2MzNy0wNWNiLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0wMDBkM2ExMzMxOWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=38FwKKmBSjWr1-cLF9MWAjcqY_ERwJqJV5AjHQX11lc=&v=MYFcM51HKgs&feature=youtu.be)**, founder of the farmworkers' union and national civil rights leader. I am honored to have Dolores' endorsement, and to support the movement for worker rights across Texas!

[**Help us share our Dolores Huerta endorsement with thousands of Texas voters. Donate $20 today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2533694/14857812/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTk5M2MzNy0wNWNiLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0wMDBkM2ExMzMxOWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=38FwKKmBSjWr1-cLF9MWAjcqY_ERwJqJV5AjHQX11lc=) I've received a number of additional endorsements in recent days, including from national organizations like **[Our Revolution](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2533695/14857813/-1237823345?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTk5M2MzNy0wNWNiLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0wMDBkM2ExMzMxOWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=38FwKKmBSjWr1-cLF9MWAjcqY_ERwJqJV5AjHQX11lc=), **the **Working Families Party** , and the **Alliance for Retired Americans**. I was also endorsed by **Rep. Ted Lieu** , a leading Democrat on the House Judiciary Committee, as well as **Rep. Lloyd Doggett**([who is hosting an event in Austin for me next week](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2533696/14857814/1806409307?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTk5M2MzNy0wNWNiLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0wMDBkM2ExMzMxOWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=38FwKKmBSjWr1-cLF9MWAjcqY_ERwJqJV5AjHQX11lc=)).

These endorsements increase the visibility of our campaign and advance our work of contacting as many voters as possible. subject: Kavanaugh Confirmed, Justice Prevailed
body:
| |
---
#
# _Kavanaugh Confirmed, Justice Prevailed_
#
“After one of the most intense political fights of the last two decades, Judge Brett Kavanaugh of the U.S. Court of Appeals for the D.C. Circuit has become Associate Justice Brett Kavanaugh of the United States Supreme Court. This is a good thing for the integrity of our Constitution, for elementary American norms, and for the long-term health of our political institutions,” the _National Review_ editorial board writes. [**Click here to read more.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA4Ljk1OTIxNTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOC45NTkyMTU0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk2ODI3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.nationalreview.com/2018/10/brett-kavanaugh-confirmed-supreme-court-justice-prevailed/) In [**_The Hill_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA4Ljk1OTIxNTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOC45NTkyMTU0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk2ODI3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://thehill.com/opinion/judiciary/410313-justice-kavanaugh-will-be-impartial-not-political-like-his-opponents), Heritage Foundation Senior Legal Fellow Thomas Jipping writes that the real story with Justice Kavanaugh is that he “will be an impartial, rather than a political, justice. He believes that the law, not his personal views or priorities, should decide the cases that come before him. Justice Kavanaugh is committed to the defined, modest role for the judiciary that America’s founders made part of their design for our system of government.” “Nearly two years after Donald Trump was elected president with promises to rework America’s relationship with its trading partners, and less than two months after he agreed to a new trade deal with Mexico, the president succeeded in bringing Canada on board a new trilateral North American trade arrangement,” [**_The Washington Times_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA4Ljk1OTIxNTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOC45NTkyMTU0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk2ODI3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/oct/8/the-new-improved-nafta/) editorial board writes. "The commentariat, the Democrats, most Republicans, the media . . . said the president would never succeed in his quest to reorient the country’s economic relationship with Canada and Mexico. But he has." Secretary of State Mike Pompeo “arrived in Seoul hours after wrapping up his fourth visit to North Korea on Sunday, telling reporters it was a ‘good trip’ and that he and [Kim] made strides on the initiatives discussed at June’s historic summit in Singapore between the North Korean leader and President Trump,” Carlo Muñoz reports for [**_The Washington Times_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA4Ljk1OTIxNTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOC45NTkyMTU0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk2ODI3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/oct/7/mike-pompeo-north-korea-talks-progress/).
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA4Ljk1OTIxNTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOC45NTkyMTU0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk2ODI3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA4Ljk1OTIxNTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOC45NTkyMTU0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk2ODI3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA4Ljk1OTIxNTQxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOC45NTkyMTU0MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk2ODI3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_13)

Human Rights Campaign (HRC) is one of Greg's largest supporters in his campaign for Congress!

name: NHGOPVets
subject: Veterans Town Hall - THIS TUESDAY!
body:
Derek The significance of sending veterans to Congress can not be overstated because they understand the issues faced by those who served. When they raise their hand and take an oath, whether it be to defend America with their lives or to uphold our Constitution with their vote, they mean what they say. **We have a great man and great candidate in U.S. Navy Veteran Eddie Edwards** who is running for Congress in the First Congressional District, and who continues to fight for our nation's heroes everyday. That’s why he is hosting a **Town Hall on Veterans Issues** **TOMORROW** **night!** [We hope that you will be able to join Eddie on October 9th at the Derry VFW Post 1617 at 6:30pm.](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyE0a8pfF-2FTvGVznY-2FCKB9JfDuSfIt-2FuBRcMj77soRNAVDgtQeiLUMWcx91Dy9YEGj7XFuzxwGA9i6tDz5YQt4IdObQzSsIwT2JDVZMiErqbJ8z2nD5qjqMtJQhqpnbkQUwQTTx-2BFOYN-2Blu2wheqh0TE-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MwuPJciS2YEnB1nZbH5pVgHqdwhk6lTGCumqfPJsvq3tMemuudv1c7wQTZm0fjfroVzzOrAi-2BBRQdYn4tt1XtbNleP2LzOqvzW1hJ-2FRG3R0TLCnv3ao8bbDTEyzfy69JWXNn1kxRwl8wtuwzE0-2BN637od9zEcBL2jhhukmEE58MiaamH2znh7LEIu-2Ff4JRgQv2Cj3AeN0q-2B86vh2FdjfXT-2FOL2-2FvLO6Cd2z3t7xuXIlkn-2BGaSAnEprH6sRbzIVaVjP24HDEpKkD6lEo1acZ3vCg-3D-3D) **When: October 9, 2018 at 6:30pm**

clean_body: Derek The significance of sending veterans to Congress can not be overstated because they understand the issues faced by those who served. When they raise their hand and take an oath, whether it be to defend America with their lives or to uphold our Constitution with their vote, they mean what they say. We have a great man and great candidate in U.S. Navy Veteran Eddie Edwards who is running for Congress in the First Congressional District, and who continues to fight for our nation's heroes everyday. That’s why he is hosting a Town Hall on Veterans Issues TOMORROW night! When: October 9, 2018 at 6:30pm Where: VFW Post 1617 - 18 Railroad Ave, Derry, NH 03038 Thank you for your time and your service. \- NHGOPVets | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

body:
What polls are showing.

"https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october?refcode=rtw_20181008_em&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, on Saturday I voted "no" on Brett Kavanaugh's nomination to the Supreme Court -- and while it's been only 48 hours, we have seen Trump's base attack me again and again for my vote. I won't be intimidated, but, with less than a month left until Election Day and Trump targeting Minnesota, I am worried that we could lose momentum in the race. **A new NPR/PBS NewsHour/Marist poll showed the "Democratic enthusiasm advantage that has defined the 2018 campaign up to this point has disappeared."** And we know Trump came within 1.5 points of winning Minnesota in 2016, so any loss of Democratic enthusiasm or momentum could tip this Senate race towards Republicans. That's why I'm asking you: [**Can you make your first contribution before midnight so we can win this critical race in November? name: Dave Chappelle
subject: Why this is my first endorsement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
For Maryland, it can't get better than Ben.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378e9d/7ab0e2c4/7e0413a6/34981a96/1707219176/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-chappelle?refcode=OHQ10088A") Friend, I've never stuck my toe into politics -- I don't even necessarily believe in politics. But this is the first time I believe in somebody this much for a job this important. That's because I know my friend and godbrother Ben Jealous. I know he fights for what matters, and I know he'll fight for my home state of Maryland. My father cautioned Ben that becoming a Rhodes Scholar might take away one of the best advocates and fighters that folks like us have here at home. But Ben came back. He's taken on tough fights and he's always stayed true to those he fights for. Ben has been a rock and a confidante for me personally, and I think for the state of Maryland, it just can't get any better. **What our country needs now is more folks in government who we can trust. I don't trust a lot of people, but I trust Ben, and I trust that he will do the best job as the next governor of Maryland.** [**Show your support with a donation of $5 or more now if you think so, too.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378e9d/7ab0e2c4/7e0413a6/34981a96/1707219176/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-chappelle?refcode=OHQ10088A") Thanks, Dave Chappelle | [CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378e9d/7ab0e2c4/7e0413a6/34981a96/1707219176/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-chappelle?refcode=OHQ10088A")

name: Ashley and Carley Sisolak
subject: We have something to say about our dad
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
Our dad did the best he could to raise us on his own. We're proud to help out with his campaign because we know that, as governor, he'll fight for access to the quality, affordable care that every Nevadan deserves.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/HskyHtbo72R5hzfZ-JQGDjPTJ6iaRgn4KblmO-WUCqE=/PtJC3RDG5Nckf9af28FrqbhjxEuRUc7rvqfdOlErBNM=?gpsid=37_57_4226&refcode=em18_181008_CANad_LG_fnd_gq_act__ACS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181008_CANad_LG_fnd_gq_act__ACS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&noskip=true)
---
Dear Friend,

If we were sick, Dad took care of us. If we needed a doctor, Dad made the appointment.

If we weren't feeling well, he made us chicken soup (even if it was from a can).

The point is, Dad knows that quality health care matters. We're proud to help out with his campaign because we know that, as governor, he'll fight for access to the quality, affordable care that every Nevadan deserves.

**[Watch the new ad we filmed with our dad about how he'll help keep Nevadans healthy -- just like he did for us while he was raising us as a single parent. Then, contribute a few dollars to help us keep the ad on the air.](https://act.myngp.com/el/HskyHtbo72R5hzfZ-JQGDjPTJ6iaRgn4KblmO-WUCqE=/PtJC3RDG5Nckf9af28FrqbhjxEuRUc7rvqfdOlErBNM=?gpsid=37_57_4226&refcode=em18_181008_CANad_L1_fnd_gq_act__ACS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181008_CANad_L1_fnd_gq_act__ACS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&noskip=true)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/HskyHtbo72R5hzfZ-JQGDjPTJ6iaRgn4KblmO-WUCqE=/PtJC3RDG5Nckf9af28FrqbhjxEuRUc7rvqfdOlErBNM=?gpsid=37_57_4226&refcode=em18_181008_CANad_SS_fnd_gq_act__ACS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181008_CANad_SS_fnd_gq_act__ACS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&noskip=true)
[WATCH THE AD](https://act.myngp.com/el/HskyHtbo72R5hzfZ-JQGDjPTJ6iaRgn4KblmO-WUCqE=/PtJC3RDG5Nckf9af28FrqbhjxEuRUc7rvqfdOlErBNM=?gpsid=37_57_4226&refcode=em18_181008_CANad_B1_fnd_gq_act__ACS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181008_CANad_B1_fnd_gq_act__ACS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&noskip=true)
Our dad did the best he could to raise us on his own. We were fortunate to have such a caring father -- and access to the care we needed to grow up healthy.

Right now, too many families in Nevada struggle to cover the cost of basic care for themselves and their families.

Our dad knows it, too, and that's why he's promising to protect the 200,000 Nevadans who depend on Medicaid expansion. And he'll make sure that insurance companies always cover people with pre-existing conditions.

**[Please take a moment to watch the ad we helped out with and then chip in $3 to make sure every Nevada voter sees it.](https://act.myngp.com/el/HskyHtbo72R5hzfZ-JQGDjPTJ6iaRgn4KblmO-WUCqE=/PtJC3RDG5Nckf9af28FrqbhjxEuRUc7rvqfdOlErBNM=?gpsid=37_57_4226&refcode=em18_181008_CANad_L2_fnd_gq_act__ACS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181008_CANad_L2_fnd_gq_act__ACS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&noskip=true)**

Thanks,

Ashley and Carley Sisolak

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/HskyHtbo72R5hzfZ-JQGDjPTJ6iaRgn4KblmO-WUCqE=/PtJC3RDG5Nckf9af28FrqbhjxEuRUc7rvqfdOlErBNM=?gpsid=37_57_4226&refcode=em18_181008_CANad_B2_fnd_gq_act__ACS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181008_CANad_B2_fnd_gq_act__ACS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&noskip=true)

name: Team Bredesen
subject: Look what Marsha Blackburn made Taylor Swift do
body:
| Hey Peter, we have some big news... are you ready for it? Taylor Swift said she’d be voting for Phil Bredesen to be Tennessee’s next United States Senator. **But if we’re going to keep up our momentum and shake off the partisan attacks, we’ll need grassroots supporters like you to keep pitching in $10 or more. Can Governor Bredesen count on your help?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Chip in $10 Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2539182/14904839/1272765920?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Nzk1NzcyYy0yZWNiLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0wMDBkM2ExMzMxOWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ubFh3ZrUBhIitj97PhBjTwWL_aJw7Qhg5Jnasg9Mi8E=&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em181008-tswift-express-tag&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)

* * *

Peter --
Last night, Taylor Swift dropped this message on Instagram:
_“I’m writing this post about the upcoming midterm elections on November 6th, in which I’ll be voting in the state of Tennessee. In the past I’ve been reluctant to publicly voice my political opinions, but due to several events in my life and in the world in the past two years, I feel very differently about that now. I always have and always will cast my vote based on which candidate will protect and fight for the human rights I believe we all deserve in this country...I will be voting for Phil Bredesen for Senate.”_
**In her long and heartfelt post** , Taylor decries Congressman Marsha Blackburn, saying: “I cannot vote for someone who will not be willing to fight for dignity for ALL Americans, no matter their skin color, gender or who they love.” **Instead, Taylor says: “I will be voting for Phil Bredesen for Senate.”**
The 10-time Grammy Award winner closes with a simple but powerful appeal to voters: “Educate yourself on the candidates running in your state and vote based on who most closely represents your values.” Within hours, Taylor’s words of support for Governor Bredesen generated more than 1 million likes on Instagram and touched off a positive frenzy in the news media and on social media.
Speaking out politically for the first time in her career, Taylor Swift explained the clear choice that voters have in this Senate race. **And Governor Bredesen thanked her on Twitter, saying: “I’m honored to have your support and that of so many Tennesseans who are ready to put aside the partisan shouting and get things done.”**
Taylor Swift isn’t the only one taking a stand in this race. Voters across Tennessee and from every background are coming together to make calls, knock on doors, and build up our campaign to get out the vote next month. Can we count on your help to keep building our momentum?
**Chip in $10 or whatever you can now to help us finish this race strong. Your support in these final weeks is key to making sure we have the resources we’ll need to win.**

name: Senator Elizabeth Warren
subject: someone you can count on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
Dear friends,
Here's something you can count on when it comes to Molly Kelly: She'll always put the people of New Hampshire ahead of corporate special interests if she's elected governor.
I know this because Molly isn't taking any corporate money to fund her campaign. And that's a huge difference from the Republican incumbent she's taking on. But she needs your help. **[Will you help elect Molly by chipping in $5 today?](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a00/d0ce7de/504560f6/9cd964f/4063686178/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTcwLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk170-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Her opponent's campaign is fueled by special interest money. They're getting what they pay for, too. As governor, he's giving big tax breaks to the wealthiest corporations in New Hampshire instead of helping working families. **[Will you join Molly's grassroots army to show Chris Sununu that New Hampshire isn't for sale?](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a00/d0ce7de/504560f6/9cd964f/4063686178/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTcwLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk170-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Molly knows the struggles that working families face. She's lived them. Like me, she worked her way through law school. She had to balance work and motherhood to create opportunities for her family - so you know she'll look out for your family if she's elected governor.
It's time to elect a new leader who will help Granite Staters get ahead and stay ahead. With your support, we can elect Molly and build a New Hampshire where everyone has the chance to succeed. **[Will you chip in $5- or whatever amount you can - right now to elect a fighter for working class families?](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a00/d0ce7de/504560f6/9cd964f/4063686178/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTcwLWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk170-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you for being a part of this.
Senator Elizabeth Warren

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Supporters of Molly Kelly email list, please click here.](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a00/d0ce7de/504560f6/9cd964e/4063686178/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://mollykelly.bsd.net/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly. Debby Butler, Fiscal Agent
_DISCLAIMER: Senator Warren is asking for contributions of up to $2,700 per election from individuals and $5,000 per election from multicandidate PACs. She is not asking for contributions in excess of the federal limits, or from corporations, labor organizations, and/or other federally prohibited sources._

I know this because Molly isn't taking any corporate money to fund her campaign. And that's a huge difference from the Republican incumbent she's taking on. But she needs your help. "" Her opponent's campaign is fueled by special interest money. They're getting what they pay for, too. As governor, he's giving big tax breaks to the wealthiest corporations in New Hampshire instead of helping working families. "" Molly knows the struggles that working families face. She's lived them. Like me, she worked her way through law school. She had to balance work and motherhood to create opportunities for her family - so you know she'll look out for your family if she's elected governor. It's time to elect a new leader who will help Granite Staters get ahead and stay ahead. With your support, we can elect Molly and build a New Hampshire where everyone has the chance to succeed. name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: challenges
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | This campaign has brought some unique challenges. Republicans "set sights" on defeating me early on. One outlet wrote that I would "have to work a little harder" to win. Well, that's just fine by me. I'm no stranger to hard work. I first ran for office when I was 25 against five other candidates, four of whom were members of the old Florida boys club of politics. I knocked on 25,000 doors and won. I out-worked them. **And with the election just 30 days from now, we need to continue that tradition.** [**In this final month of the campaign, we need to raise $218,000. Will you help us jump-start the month with a contribution?**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cb4/622b7b5b/1d041783/307b6aa4/2089041181/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181006?refcode=dwse181006_m&recurring=true&amount=5") It's not the challenges we face in this campaign that keep me up at night -- it's the challenges Florida families face every day, and how much worse those challenges will get if Republicans continue to control Congress. Florida families face challenges like paying the mortgage or medical bills, affording their prescriptions, or worrying about their kids' safety while they're at school. These are the challenges I focus on. It's my job to fight for you, and I don't care how much Republican wrath I get for doing it. But I need you, too. [**Help us reach this October goal and keep fighting all the challenges that come our way.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cb4/622b7b5b/1d041783/307b6aa4/2089041181/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181006?refcode=dwse181006_m&recurring=true&amount=5") | | | [Donate Now](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cb4/622b7b5b/1d041783/307b6aa4/2089041181/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181006?refcode=dwse181006_m&recurring=true&amount=5")
---
Thank you,
Debbie

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113cb4/622b7b5b/1d041783/307b6aa7/2089041181/VEsC/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/unsubscribe")

name: Leah
subject: tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
I’m putting the final touches on my debate prep and am ready to face Tammy Baldwin. But ahead of this debate, I need to know that you’re with me.

Friend,

I’m putting the final touches on my debate prep and am ready to face Tammy Baldwin.

Friend, I’m prepared. I’m motivated. I know that Baldwin is wrong for Wisconsin, and I’m going to fight to the death until our conservative values are protected. I’m going to go out there and put Wisconsin first - not the liberal agenda, party leaders, or rich donors.

[**But ahead of this debate, I need to know that you’re with me.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=9d450d81f81a4eef929ceb4f17a22e2c&_e=FkwoBWFBaEDhpdyx15aHXE1Rn0LRiSxuf9JVzEGaRHGHC3gnfrpvJoBhURWOiI8KNsh-0mYYaXKqH7vtNpdN2j2X1syDKMEULkBulORXZULBHqQ_7Za8A6b68WZViL9xz6zuKcxsX0hSl0pEoy6JuCmilsLF4xiu3QVCJort0ONRvCYgeTe9OImiu575882md5LwuHhPcdhaof7aUD2EjxIHhUAOwL6fXENojm5IB0bDpCtd8ERbFpL6qWPWQ3tP51evs_kZtoKQKoYTV3PIN8ojFIieVH6K6I-IV-smbpj69jF9lHbGzPryTeUanMgHlZRvHFW3gtNvwZcvBSDyuQr-rYUAJTgN_qSLQ6FD9DHn3i9IXh7Ks2fjZwYgg2bormHnR-3yvjLJni5jrI0iig%3D%3D)

[SHOW LEAH YOU'RE WITH HER](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=9d450d81f81a4eef929ceb4f17a22e2c&_e=FkwoBWFBaEDhpdyx15aHXE1Rn0LRiSxuf9JVzEGaRHGHC3gnfrpvJoBhURWOiI8KNsh-0mYYaXKqH7vtNpdN2j2X1syDKMEULkBulORXZULBHqQ_7Za8A6b68WZViL9xz6zuKcxsX0hSl0pEoy6JuCmilsLF4xiu3QVCJort0OMrzlOv9jIevA17I1LSLsl6PpnffFnyts85vkJSfm3hpaDMs6jFkO-NY8lHFFa5tt9iUwjZVZs9WGdV9fsYf09A11igzcHCZk856opbebb2jZ7U3U7CTgkhRUGqYmhXKPBk7JQjqUQhr-Zq3ifJtiLOTZNpOFXFxKx5CnVZTi1GTSwtghKwNOi0iIfv6KMirvNThG_PW9rsZckGmD08ViMQBiyPp3E9jAVvlj6faKxL2g%3D%3D)
---

I need to know that when I step out on that debate stage, I have the support of hard-working Wisconsinites from every corner of our great state.

I need to know that you’re in this fight alongside me. [**Will you show me?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=9d450d81f81a4eef929ceb4f17a22e2c&_e=FkwoBWFBaEDhpdyx15aHXE1Rn0LRiSxuf9JVzEGaRHGHC3gnfrpvJoBhURWOiI8KNsh-0mYYaXKqH7vtNpdN2j2X1syDKMEULkBulORXZULBHqQ_7Za8A6b68WZViL9xz6zuKcxsX0hSl0pEoy6JuCmilsLF4xiu3QVCJort0OOLUPY3Azm_Mzt0XuQj1H4XcVUBw0_wpQWlNQFkHEku_DQX4T-dMQrqikjF7Be5gHMBD-Dk7JpLcNKeHl_gfEa-coCCZC4BtWcHkEp8Bp1vgt2YRFfPBkE3WHr_MnwH-hA5FKaRRO9-GLOD4-HXTSoDz_8Wh7ZhvJYKHJ58ws8Q0j7KbBECd-pT_Oq0w1n3eMa-GHl9SBNC8BpKSFVc1OznJSlBXGe4WDmoxEKVOu_xpA%3D%3D)

I’m not expecting a warm welcome from Baldwin when I get up on that stage. Lies and half truths are going to fly – about my record, my character, and my plans for Wisconsin. But I need you to stand with me.

We’re in this fight for Wisconsin together, friend. I know I can count on you.

-Leah

I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=9d450d81f81a4eef929ceb4f17a22e2c&_e=FkwoBWFBaEDhpdyx15aHXK5TGXQ4MiZ-PTAjON_nkLX4szMivtIplJU-kX9hCBjLUpHUTgiGomUD0W4bzGVSBTsj7PSHZa3bYLEvy8KezYOfbdGo_5toEpVmsb7ykLfKkrIADyt98FQNGGq4hu5ynylPhyBaRBUFl-JdPUAauW7TU-CPORvbtJ5ZCvUUXf_q0ObIZQQ4eGMvC-t8okeicuHoPPzvtrkmKoVZeoJQpwSjsB_-g2VIXhxcQb83CwsT_D9lJThvnSTrCyzynF0_FDklsMj5WvW43-eKMmJnHxd4eikXLnPLA1tZSelpNnbSkUv4eyUGqnMz-jzm9rg9mp9r1t3ifDnWIU_L-gAZl1qBl-3yj1pTEraCSncWiySy) that you care about? So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=9d450d81f81a4eef929ceb4f17a22e2c&_e=FkwoBWFBaEDhpdyx15aHXK5TGXQ4MiZ-PTAjON_nkLVL9nohXEGQYUasFBp5lo4TWffZGLY1Dtywm7NkmNTqbsMtbLxCghXjBZSARCoQfryftm4GkGaQ_2kFzyUXL9XHBs0ymzzAA732Z6S9am-g3sR8PZ7az7BC5kVmYIDzcFPprFcjnXSk8r8ljoCNao8u_rGY7Og7FvS8xCd5GXlSGFdBP1PDodoACSVZ5CovvJQIQ0ehnWGwJHsLFfaSxEd2QECUoToKSYnZdVoyATDl2v3ENOtCvwWEiMfoDIr97yDxjuRWrPl6A5YcwWX1suB0ov4YHr3Rwo6DPnTk3OMikVsXWq8yco8XxLb1VGseKDchUdh79JSyyA0KlEWmh147) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. clean_body: I’m putting the final touches on my debate prep and am ready to face Tammy Baldwin. But ahead of this debate, I need to know that you’re with me. Friend, I’m putting the final touches on my debate prep and am ready to face Tammy Baldwin. Friend, I’m prepared. I’m motivated. I know that Baldwin is wrong for Wisconsin, and I’m going to fight to the death until our conservative values are protected. I’m going to go out there and put Wisconsin first - not the liberal agenda, party leaders, or rich donors. I need to know that when I step out on that debate stage, I have the support of hard-working Wisconsinites from every corner of our great state. I need to know that you’re in this fight alongside me. I’m not expecting a warm welcome from Baldwin when I get up on that stage. Lies and half truths are going to fly – about my record, my character, and my plans for Wisconsin. But I need you to stand with me. We’re in this fight for Wisconsin together, friend. I know I can count on you. -Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

We have just over 3 weeks until Election Day.

_It’s crunch time, and we need all hands on deck to win on November 6._

**#TeamPence is hosting a Super Saturday volunteer event this Saturday, October 13 from 9AM – 9PM at our Team Pence HQ in Columbus.**

I’ll be joining volunteers on the phone to call voters around the 6th District. Can you help us?
[ **Sign Up** ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=d08daa4bd33d4758b0184098dd8b2f75&_e=_1u1kW-F4jJOZa-mVuFwC4sCqo8E5DvOxctYadmIz1KxkJ7zrTLBChUKD-yXZYjdkF3izl0BAT_8ul6Edfl6mH2Q_xXyCJ89KIDUf-_3z0PxGakSjMLimS5oCW1s5pf6YSvc3a-K8Sj0UtE21q0asEGthjlE4jlUfisvjmQ2Lor5OpdrKtPgfxfR42eMVsrcRvaGrwZt2iKpwzsXCwnb_HF59YzuTkKNdy_v7-jkTXoG4rDyAQF1wlKid4k9d8O_J5pbg2i-EcFZwjP6lMqt6KbF2tIiyq_PPDfCwsBwu61lWj6Kx7ffx-MaW9W9Q3taFdF9W8zRJngqkrCeZv34kuHfqArVuTCm-ysfwwKuG7RREk_A47Doz6nA17k6vulOVZnC-MeOggY9vPpuFAh57g%3D%3D)

name: Bob Casey
subject: don't let the Trump administration win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7df2/51dbcc2a/117f77f6/3aaa1ac/274784235/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
(null):

We _cannot_ stop fighting. Not when the Trump administration decided to pass a massive tax break for the wealthiest 1%, not when Senate Republicans are coming after protections for people with pre-existing conditions and not when far-right special interests sold out the middle class.

Every time Republicans in Washington have decided to put working families last, I have fought with both fists up to put those families first. Now, with 29 days until Election Day, I need your help to keep fighting. To really put a stop to the GOP's almost unchecked power, we need to elect a Democratic Senate majority, and we can't do that if I lose.

If Republicans hold on to the majority, we can expect them to continue their assault on protections for people with pre-existing conditions, continue to pass tax laws that make it harder for families to get ahead and even follow through on their threats to decimate Medicaid and Medicare. We can't let that happen.

I've been a firewall against the Trump administration's most dangerous and divisive pieces of legislation, but I can't keep fighting without your help. **Will you join me in this fight by making a donation to my campaign today? There 's too much at risk to lose this year.**

**_[secure.bobcasey.com/fight-back](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181008_fr1_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks,

Bob

| Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.

PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102

name: Jody Casey, betofortexas.com
subject: We’re crowdfunding this goal for Beto
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Ted Cruz is up on airwaves attacking our campaign with misleading,
negative TV ads -- and up to ELEVEN outside groups (PACs and super PACs)
have pledged to spend millions against Beto.

Amidst the ugly, hateful attack ads, Beto filmed a LIVE ad with a positive
message: “We can be defined by our fears or known for our ambitions.”

It’s the final few weeks of this campaign, and recent polls show Beto
behind Cruz by just a few points. So we’re going to do something totally
unusual: today, we’re announcing a HUGE Beto for Texas crowdfunding effort
to help us reach more voters before Election Day. We’ll name two winners:
the person who raises the most through their unique link, and the person
who brings in the most individual donors. Our winners will get a special
prize and a shout-out from Beto on social media!

Check out the instructions below:

--------------------------------------------

Here’s how it works:

1. Your personal link tracks all donations that come through it. Copy the
link now:

https://betofortexas.com/crowdfunding/dpwillis67@gmail.com

2. [ https://betofortexas.com/crowdfunding/dpwillis67@gmail.com ]Make a donation of
$3
yourself through your personal link to get started.

3. Here’s the most important part: we need you to send your personal
donation like link via email or text message to your friends and
family. Ask them to pitch in through your crowdfunding page. You can
tell them the average contribution to Beto’s campaign is about $35.

4. On Friday, we’ll let you know how much you raised through your page.
The person who gets the most people to contribute through their page
will get a shout-out from Beto on social media!

--------------------------------------------

This is pretty unusual -- we’re pretty sure no one has ever tried
something quite like this for a U.S. Senate campaign. But we’ve always
been far from ordinary. Without any support from PACs or special
interests, we really need this crowdfunding effort to work.

[ https://betofortexas.com/crowdfunding/dpwillis67@gmail.com ]Add your
$3
donation through your personal link right now, and then circulate it among
your friends.

This plan could backfire, and we may never reach our goal. But if everyone
reading this email convinces just one friend to contribute, it’ll be a
HUGE success.

Something special is happening in Texas. The uglier Cruz and company get,
the more people Beto is going to meet and listen to.

Jody Casey
Campaign Manager
Beto for Texas

[ https://betofortexas.com/crowdfunding/dpwillis67@gmail.com ]Contribute
$3
»

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20181008footer&t=1001&akid=16318%2E444211%2EdUgyLU

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=16318%2E444211%2EdUgyLU

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Trump wants me to lose my job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | **President Trump wants me to lose my job as your Senator.** That's why he's coming back to Ohio -- AGAIN -- to support Republicans, including my opponent, multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci. **Special interests want me to lose my job as your Senator.** That's why the NRSC just launched a new attack against me. **And if we don't step up in the final month, they may get their wish.** Recent polls show the race tightening to the single digits. If we let up in our grassroots efforts, we could be in trouble. [**Which is why I'm personally asking you for a contribution Peter.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe67/4462dc26/7e06b693/2018e6ec/805195796/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDA4IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181008?refcode=sbe181008_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe67/4462dc26/7e06b693/2018e6e3/805195796/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDA4IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181008?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe181008_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe67/4462dc26/7e06b693/2018e6e3/805195796/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDA4IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181008?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe181008_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe67/4462dc26/7e06b693/2018e6e3/805195796/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDA4IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181008?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe181008_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe67/4462dc26/7e06b693/2018e6ec/805195796/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDA4IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181008?refcode=sbe181008_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** The final month can make or break a campaign. So far, you have stepped up every time I've asked. We've countered the attacks, we've responded every time Trump came for a visit, and together, we've reached our important goals. Our strength comes from you, one $26 average online contribution at a time. And in these final 30 days, with Trump all-in for my opponent, we have to keep that momentum going. [**Peter, give.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe67/4462dc26/7e06b693/2018e6ec/805195796/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDA4IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181008?refcode=sbe181008_m_other&refcode2=3268183") And please know that I am incredibly grateful for all of your help. | | | [Donate](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe67/4462dc26/7e06b693/2018e6ec/805195796/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgxMDA4IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe181008?refcode=sbe181008_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
---
With gratitude,
Sherrod

name: Stephanie Schriock, EMILY's List
subject: About this weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118cb2e8/24c69fd9/233073c47/18bb5db3/1457556419/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEV32N_digital_email_20181008_KavSSResponse_inact&source=WQEFEV32N_digital_email_20181008_KavSSResponse_inact")
---

Peter,

After credible allegations of serial sexual assault.

After the brave, powerful testimony of Dr. Christine Blasey Ford.

After women took to the streets demanding that their senators believe survivors.

And after outrageously partisan testimony by the accused showing terrible temperament, the impossible became a reality:

Republicans confirmed Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court on Saturday.

I am disappointed and angry. But women will not forget this.

We will carry our anger into next month's election, and we will decide this election, and elections beyond.

We will elect fierce pro-choice Democratic women who will protect our rights.

**[Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women up and down the ballot this year and for years to come.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118cb2e8/24c69fd9/233073c47/18bb5dac/1457556419/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20181001_email_OctElectWomen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+prochoice+Democra&utm_campaign=WQEFEV32N_digital_email_20181008_KavSSResponse_inact&source=WQEFEV32N_digital_email_20181008_KavSSResponse_inact")**

We're extremely thankful for our four women on the Senate Judiciary Committee -- Sens. **Dianne Feinstein** (CA), **Amy Klobuchar** (MN), **Mazie Hirono** (HI), and **Kamala Harris** (CA) -- who ensured that women's voices were heard during this process.

And we're proud that every single Democratic woman voted against Kavanaugh's confirmation.

But with the Senate in Republican control, we can't stop fighting to make sure our rights are protected.

We _must_ take back the Senate.

And we must elect a wave of pro-choice Democratic women to office in November, who will stand up to a party more interested in giving a man a promotion than listening to survivors. And, yes, in 2020, we will make sure that senators like Lindsey Graham and Susan Collins lose their seats.

I hope you'll join me. **Donate $3 today to help elect pro-choice Democratic women:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Elect-Women-Up-and-Down-the-Ballot](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118cb2e8/24c69fd9/233073c47/18bb5dad/1457556419/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20181001_email_OctElectWomen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgElectWomenUpandD&utm_campaign=WQEFEV32N_digital_email_20181008_KavSSResponse_inact&source=WQEFEV32N_digital_email_20181008_KavSSResponse_inact")**

We'll never stop fighting.

Thank you,

Stephanie Schriock
President, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118cb2e8/24c69fd9/233073c47/18bb5dae/1457556419/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20181001_email_OctElectWomen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFEV32N_digital_email_20181008_KavSSResponse_inact&source=WQEFEV32N_digital_email_20181008_KavSSResponse_inact")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---

1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118cb2e8/24c69fd9/233073c47/18bb5da9/1457556419/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFEV32N_digital_email_20181008_KavSSResponse_inact&source=WQEFEV32N_digital_email_20181008_KavSSResponse_inact"). One of the latest generic polls shows Republicans have cut the Democrat lead in half the last month but the GOP still trails by 7 points.

Conservatives have limited time and resources to close this gap down to 4 or 5 points –where we can win with the help of independents –between now and Election Day.

name: Carrie Lucking, Campaign Manager
subject: We need help
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
|
---

Friend,

Thank you -- so many folks stepped up last night that we were able to launch our new ad, "Nineteen."

The ad tells Tim's powerful health care story. Tim's dad died of cancer when he was just 19 years old and his chemotherapy wasn't covered by insurance. It cost Tim's mom a decade of going back to work to pay off the bills. He knows the importance of a future where everyone has access to quality and affordable health care. Minnesotans need to know that for Tim, health care isn't a policy issue -- it's a personal issue.

But here's the thing: **we ran the numbers, and if we raise an additional $6,500 by midnight tonight,** we can expand our ad buy and reach a bunch more Minnesotans.

_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

# VTDigger Gubernatorial Debate:
Wednesday, October 10th at 6:30 PM

We are just 29 days from Election Day, and the choice for governor couldn't be more clear. Governor Scott is the candidate who's committed to making Vermont more affordable and growing the economy.

This Wednesday, the Governor will debate his opponent in Rutland at 6:30 PM at the Paramount Theatre (30 Center Street, Rutland, VT 05701).

The debate is open to the public, and you can [get your tickets by clicking here](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=fdad10f87a&e=19cebfe173).

If you can't make it, you can check out the livestream at [https://www.facebook.com/vtdigger/](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=db59ebfeda&e=19cebfe173)

We hope to see you there!

Let's keep moving Vermont forward.

\- Team Scott

name: Keren, Kaine Campaign Manager
subject: Here's the truth:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
There's one question I get asked all the time - truly multiple times a day. "What can I do to help?" Well...there are exciting answers, and then there are true answers. -------------------------------
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1069/3e0906/76daec89/3e37baaa/2799252034/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20181008_1_FR_KCD_donate-LDND&source=20181008_1_FR_KCD_donate-LDND")

| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, I want to let you in on something:

There's one question I get asked all the time - truly multiple times a day.

_"What can I do to help?"_

Well...there are exciting answers, and then there are true answers.

**The truest possible answer to that question is:[donate](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1069/3e0906/76daec89/3e37baa8/2799252034/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181008_1_FR_KCD_donate-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+donate&utm_campaign=20181008_1_FR_KCD_donate-LDND&source=20181008_1_FR_KCD_donate-LDND") (and if you live in Virginia, VOTE!). I know it's not thrilling, and I know, when you're already getting asked to chip in all the time, it can even feel exhausting. But the reason we ask all the time is that it truly is the most impactful thing you can do to support Democratic candidates.**

These candidates that you care about - Tim Kaine, for one, but also the 11 Democrats running for Congress, and local candidates all across Virginia - have been working for months (years, really) to prepare for Election Day. They've been hiring staff, opening offices, filming TV ads, and traveling around to talk to voters in person. But they can't do any of that without financial resources. [So when you make a donation online today, you truly are doing the most important thing you can do.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1069/3e0906/76daec89/3e37baae/2799252034/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181008_1_FR_KCD_donate-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+So+when+you+make+a+donation+online+today&utm_campaign=20181008_1_FR_KCD_donate-LDND&source=20181008_1_FR_KCD_donate-LDND") You're enabling these committed, strong Democratic candidates to do their very best work, without worrying about whether they'll be able to make payroll, or keep the lights on. And that's priceless.

**So if you've been wondering what you can really do to help - amidst a nightmarish news cycle, continual crises in the White House, and emails piling up in your inbox - the answer is this:[Donate. Please.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1069/3e0906/76daec89/3e37baad/2799252034/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-gotv?refcode=20181008_1_FR_KCD_donate-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Donate+Please&utm_campaign=20181008_1_FR_KCD_donate-LDND&source=20181008_1_FR_KCD_donate-LDND")** _As you read this, people are already voting in the 2018 midterm elections. subject: Our 114th Supreme Court Justice
body:
| |
---
The White House • October 8, 2018
## Our 114th Supreme Court Justice
##
##
**On July 9, 2018** , President Donald J. Trump nominated Judge Brett M. Kavanaugh to fill retiring Justice Anthony Kennedy’s seat on the United States Supreme Court. “There is no one in America more qualified for this position, and no one more deserving,” President Trump [**said during his announcement**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA4Ljk1OTM5MTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOC45NTkzOTE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk3MDE1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/remarks-president-trump-announcing-judge-brett-m-kavanaugh-nominee-associate-justice-supreme-court-united-states/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d). **“The Rule of Law is our nation’s proud heritage.** It is the cornerstone of our freedom. It is what guarantees equal justice,” the President added. **On Saturday, by a vote of 50-48** , the U.S. Senate upheld that principle and confirmed Judge Kavanaugh’s appointment to the High Court. Tonight, President Trump will address the nation at a swearing-in ceremony from the East Room of the White House. **Throughout his exemplary career,** Judge Kavanaugh has let the Constitution guide his decisions. Tonight, with the disgraceful partisan politics of the past three months behind us, America is getting a Justice who understands that the role of a judge is to faithfully interpret the law as written—not to legislate from the bench. [**Meet America’s 114th Supreme Court Justice, Brett M. Kavanaugh.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA4Ljk1OTM5MTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOC45NTkzOTE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk3MDE1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/scotus/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **Watch live at 7 p.m. ET:** [**Brett Kavanaugh is sworn in as Associate Justice.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA4Ljk1OTM5MTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOC45NTkzOTE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk3MDE1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=l0qYiAukIbc)
## Video of the day: ‘The men and women in blue’
##
**Today, President Trump** traveled to Orlando, Florida,**** to address the Annual Convention for the International Association of Chiefs of Police. “My Administration will always honor, cherish, and support the men and women in blue. And we are proud to do it,” the President said. **[Watch the full clip.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA4Ljk1OTM5MTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOC45NTkzOTE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk3MDE1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1049384995956109312)******
# The meaning of Columbus Day
**On Columbus Day** , we remember an achievement that changed the course of history. In 1492, Christopher Columbus crossed the Atlantic and discovered the Americas, ushering in a new Age of Discovery. **“His expedition formed the initial bond** between Europe and the Americas,” President Trump writes in his Columbus Day 2018 Proclamation. “Today, in that spirit, we continue to seek new horizons for greater opportunity and further discovery on land, in sea, and in space.” **[Read President Trump’s full Proclamation for Columbus Day 2018.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA4Ljk1OTM5MTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOC45NTkzOTE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk3MDE1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/presidential-proclamation-columbus-day-2018/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) ** **The next frontier** : [**The Trump Administration reclaims America’s proud destiny in space.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA4Ljk1OTM5MTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOC45NTkzOTE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk3MDE1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-achieving-safe-secure-future-space/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
#
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
**President Donald J. Trump gives remarks Monday at the International Association of Chiefs of Police and Law Enforcement Convention in Orlando, Florida** | October 8, 2018
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA4Ljk1OTM5MTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOC45NTkzOTE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk3MDE1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA4Ljk1OTM5MTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOC45NTkzOTE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk3MDE1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDA4Ljk1OTM5MTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAwOC45NTkzOTE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzk3MDE1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&108&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

name: Jeanne
subject: Heidi's courageous vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Last week, my friend Heidi Heitkamp showed immense character and courage. She announced that she would be voting "no" on Brett Kavanaugh's confirmation - a vote based on her conscience, not politics.

This is exactly why we need Heidi in the Senate, but she's in the fight of her life, and after this vote the GOP is only going to dig its heels in to defeat her and replace her with a right-wing extremist. (**[Click here right now to give $5 and help Heidi win in North Dakota.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4hh?refcode=jtk923-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**)

**Nate Silver's __ FiveThirtyEight is predicting that a voter in North Dakota will be ** __28_ times_** likelier to decide Senate control in November. **

That means everything is riding on what happens in North Dakota, but recent polling shows Heidi trailing her GOP opponent, and 23 right-wing groups are spending $10.5 million to defeat her.

Heidi's race in 2012 was the closest Senate race that year - she won by just under 3,000 votes - so she needs our immediate grassroots support to fight back against Mitch McConnell and the GOP's deep-pocketed donors.
**I told Heidi we could help her raise another $15,000 before midnight - so I'm counting on top supporters like you to step up immediately and help Heidi close the gap now. ****[Please, will you donate $5 right now to reelect Heidi Heitkamp in North Dakota and take back the Senate for Democrats in November?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4hh?refcode=jtk923-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**

___If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be evenly split between Heidi Heitkamp and Jeanne Shaheen:___ **[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4hh?refcode=jtk923-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5)** **[Click to donate $25.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4hh?refcode=jtk923-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25)** **[Click to donate $50.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4hh?refcode=jtk923-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50)** **[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4hh?refcode=jtk923-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you,

Jeanne

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
