clean_body: | | | Last week, my friend Heidi Heitkamp showed immense character and courage. She announced that she would be voting "no" on Brett Kavanaugh's confirmation - a vote based on her conscience, not politics. This is exactly why we need Heidi in the Senate, but she's in the fight of her life, and after this vote the GOP is only going to dig its heels in to defeat her and replace her with a right-wing extremist. () Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight is predicting that a voter in North Dakota will be 28 times likelier to decide Senate control in November. That means everything is riding on what happens in North Dakota, but recent polling shows Heidi trailing her GOP opponent, and 23 right-wing groups are spending $10.5 million to defeat her. Heidi's race in 2012 was the closest Senate race that year - she won by just under 3,000 votes - so she needs our immediate grassroots support to fight back against Mitch McConnell and the GOP's deep-pocketed donors. I told Heidi we could help her raise another $15,000 before midnight - so I'm counting on top supporters like you to step up immediately and help Heidi close the gap now. _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be evenly split between Heidi Heitkamp and Jeanne Shaheen: Thank you, Jeanne | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by Shaheen for Senate Contributions or gifts to Shaheen for Senate are not tax deductible.

name: Ryan Mulcahy
subject: our LAST CHANCE to register voters!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
Here at Team O'Halleran, our voter registration efforts are in overdrive. That's because the deadline to register to vote or update your registration here in Arizona is TOMORROW.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633ebd/1a8421e1/19a55a7ca/49314e12/4248535279/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Friends, Here at Team O'Halleran, our voter registration efforts are in overdrive. That's because the deadline to register to vote or update your registration here in Arizona is TOMORROW -- so this is our _last chance_ to make sure our supporters can vote for Tom! With a recent poll showing our far-right opponent, Wendy Rogers, claiming a small lead over Tom, **we 're fighting for every single vote here in AZ-01.** So it's imperative to make sure that every single one of our supporters can vote on Election Day. **[Can you make a donation today to support our final voter registration drive? We've set an ambitious goal of registering a lot more voters by the end of tomorrow, so every dollar is a big help.](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.08_b1_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** This is a grassroots campaign, and [**your support**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.08_b1_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") over the past few months has been critical in funding our efforts to register new voters, and it will be critical in the month ahead as we shift our efforts toward turning our supporters out to vote. A lot's at stake here -- we need to keep AZ-01 blue to take back the House, and Rogers is so extreme that she thinks Social Security is unconstitutional -- so we aren't taking anything for granted in this race. [**We 're going to keep registering voters until tomorrow's deadline, so make a donation if you can to help us.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.08_b1_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks, Ryan Mulcahy Campaign Manager P.S. If you're an Arizona resident, but you still need to register -- hurry, and [**follow this link for more information!**](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633ebd/1a8421e1/19a55a7ca/49314e14/4248535279/VEsD/ "https://www.azdem.org/voting/") | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.08_b1_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **

** **

Peter,
**Starting today, counties across California can begin mailing ballots out to voters.** As you read this email, voters have begun making their final choice between Jessica and Tom McClintock.

Instead, what are Democrats doing now that he’s finally confirmed? Calling for his impeachment. Just like they did when President Trump won in 2016, Democrats weren’t able to obstruct Kavanaugh’s confirmation so now they're threatening to remove him by Congressional force.

name: StaceyAbrams.com
subject: This is your last reminder!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
Tomorrow is the voter registration deadline in Georgia! |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa88b/34a064cc/f931eef/70ddccc/203445664/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | This is not a drill - **Tomorrow is the voter registration deadline in Georgia.** So if you haven't had a chance to register yet, DO IT NOW! And if you've registered before, check it again right now. **Visit this[website](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa88b/34a064cc/f931eef/70ddccd/203445664/VEsE/ "https://registertovote.sos.ga.gov/GAOLVR/welcometoga.do#no-back-button") and click the button on the left to register online, or the button on the right to print the form and register by mail. Mailed registrations must be postmarked by Oct. 9th.** **[REGISTER TO VOTE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa88b/34a064cc/f931eef/70ddccd/203445664/VEsF/ "https://registertovote.sos.ga.gov/GAOLVR/welcometoga.do#no-back-button")** If you're already registered, check your registration to make sure! We're serious - you don't want to show up to vote for Stacey and realize you won't be allowed to cast a ballot. And please, everybody take a moment to forward this email to your friends, neighbors, nieces, nephews, anybody you know, to make sure they have a chance to register before tomorrow's deadline. There is no better way to make your voice heard than by casting a ballot. Your right to vote is sacred, but the only way to defend it is to use it. \- Team Abrams

name: Justin Jones
subject: help us set up more yard signs!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Here at Team Spanberger, we're proud to be running a campaign that is a grassroots effort, through and through. One way we're spreading the word about Abigail is through our yard signs across the district.
| | Peter, Here at Team Spanberger, we're proud to be running a campaign that is a grassroots effort, through and through. We have a tremendous team of volunteers, 4,000+ strong, knocking doors around Central Virginia every weekend, so we can reach every undecided voter in our district and tell them about Abigail's positive vision for our community. And, you may have noticed, **there are also a lot of Spanberger for Congress yard signs up across VA-7.** Many of our supporters are showing their support for Abigail by putting a sign up on their own lawns, _and along busy roads, we 're spreading the word with these:_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/EZpIoal8-k-yTHIloGdJSt9Qiiev7ojBz2M4pgHREGI=/YmeiRhET52bl7lFMVQ6ecwNB9Qbzx5xv0MlztHjRf6o=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.08_b1_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [_**You can help us set up more of these signs with a donation right here!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/EZpIoal8-k-yTHIloGdJSt9Qiiev7ojBz2M4pgHREGI=/YmeiRhET52bl7lFMVQ6ecwNB9Qbzx5xv0MlztHjRf6o=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.08_b1_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Yard signs might seem old-fashioned in the age of social media, but they're an important way we're making sure voters across our district know that Abigail is running to represent us in Congress. We're hoping to set up even more of these signs in the final weeks leading up to Election Day, Peter, and the big ones cost about $50 each. [**Will you help us spread the word about our campaign with a donation today -- whether it 's $50 or $5 -- so we can set up more?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/EZpIoal8-k-yTHIloGdJSt9Qiiev7ojBz2M4pgHREGI=/YmeiRhET52bl7lFMVQ6ecwNB9Qbzx5xv0MlztHjRf6o=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.08_b1_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Justin Jones _Communications Director, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/EZpIoal8-k-yTHIloGdJSt9Qiiev7ojBz2M4pgHREGI=/YmeiRhET52bl7lFMVQ6ecwNB9Qbzx5xv0MlztHjRf6o=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.08_b1_jj_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/EZpIoal8-k-yTHIloGdJSt9Qiiev7ojBz2M4pgHREGI=/YmeiRhET52bl7lFMVQ6ecwNB9Qbzx5xv0MlztHjRf6o=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/EZpIoal8-k-yTHIloGdJSt9Qiiev7ojBz2M4pgHREGI=/4A-XW9BP7jHs6v5TvIBo1SDXt0dFIgRL-oE-e_ErTvM=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/EZpIoal8-k-yTHIloGdJSt9Qiiev7ojBz2M4pgHREGI=/wHFMSO4IgVVuC9dvp2PsqIkT5hxji5jUTfOtLoERDkQ=).

name: Brad Elkins
subject: We need to answer these ads
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | I'll keep this quick: a national Libertarian super PAC just announced it is spending **_$2 million_** on pro-Gary Johnson ads.

**_[We can't let these ads go unanswered. Help Martin fight back by contributing to our rapid response efforts now ->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-super-pac-rapid-response?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+We+canrsquot+let+these+ads+go+unanswered&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2")_**

\-- Brad

_Begin original message:_

| **ALERT: SUPER PAC ANNOUNCES $2 MILLION SPEND TO SUPPORT GARY JOHNSON**

We need to act fast to defend Martin, team.

**_[Fight back by raising $60,000 more for Martin's Rapid Response Fund!](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-super-pac-rapid-response?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+Fight+back+by+raising+60000+more+for+Mar&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2")_**
---

This is the day we knew was coming: **A national Libertarian super PAC aligned with Gary Johnson just announced it is spending TWO MILLION on pro-Johnson ads.**

Now that national, deep-pocketed super PACs are flooding the airwaves with ads for Johnson, we need to **_act fast_** to fight back.

**Here 's what it will take: _[We need $60,000 into our Rapid Response Fund in the next 48 hours so we can buy more airtime for Martin and expand our grassroots organizing. Donate $29 or more now so we are prepared for whatever else comes our way between now and Election Day->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-super-pac-rapid-response?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+We+need+60000+into+our+Rapid+Response+Fu&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2")_**

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_
**[Donate $10 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-super-pac-rapid-response?express_lane=true&amount=10amp;firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2")**
**[Donate $29 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-super-pac-rapid-response?express_lane=true&amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2")**
****[Donate $50 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-super-pac-rapid-response?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2")****
**[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-super-pac-rapid-response?amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=7+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2")**
Gary Johnson already dropped six-figures of his own money into the race to support his campaign. Now, a super PAC is spending **two million dollars** to prop up Johnson. We can't risk getting washed away by national Libertarian donors.

**_[That's why we need your support ASAP. Click here to rush a contribution and help Martin fight back against this latest ad buy!](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-super-pac-rapid-response?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=8+-+Thatrsquos+why+we+need+your+support+ASAP&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2")_**

Thanks for your support. We'll make sure to keep you up to date on other developments in our race.

**Here is one last link to donate:_[http://nm.martinheinrich.com/Fight-The-Super-PACs](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-super-pac-rapid-response?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=9+-+httpnmmartinheinrichcomFightTheSuperPACs&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2")_**

\-- Heinrich HQ

| PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
---
**Help us spread the word by forwarding this email to 3 friends!**
Receive this email from a friend? **[Sign up now to join Martin's team!](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b45a/43d8135f/66c55e4f/51005bea/1141444540/VEsHBQ/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/footer-join-martins-team?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=10+-+Sign+up+now+to+join+Martins+team&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2")**

Make sure to follow the campaign on **[Twitter](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b45a/43d8135f/66c55e4f/51005bed/1141444540/VEsHBA/ "https://twitter.com/teamheinrich?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=11+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2")** and **[Facebook.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b45a/43d8135f/66c55e4f/51005bec/1141444540/VEsHBw/ "https://www.facebook.com/TeamHeinrich/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=12+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2")**

**If you want to be the first to know what we're working on next,[sign up for text updates.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b45a/43d8135f/66c55e4f/51005bef/1141444540/VEsHBg/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/texts?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=13+-+sign+up+for+text+updates&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2")**

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a key part of our grassroots team. If you would like to unsubscribe from these emails click [here](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b45a/43d8135f/66c55e4f/51005bee/1141444540/VEsHAQ/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181008_2_2").

PO Box 25763
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team_S=C3=A1nchez?=
subject: Turning our anger into action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
body:
Help our final push before Election Day to win back control of the House! [](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_181008_Kavanaugh_EM&&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
Peter, we wanted to make sure you got Linda's note from yesterday. At a critical moment for our nation, we are determined to turn our anger into action.

[**In Linda 's final push before Election Day ensure that Democrats have the resources to flip the 23 seats they need to gain control of the House, we are aiming to raise $23,000 from grassroots supporters like you. Can you chip in?**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?refcode=RTW_181008_Kavanaugh_EM&&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Your donation will help Linda's team knock the doors and make the calls that will push key toss-up races over the line -- especially several right here in California.

Thank you!

Team Sanchez

**\---- ORIGINAL MESSAGE ----**
> Peter --
>
> Well, they did it. They really did it. Brett Kavanaugh has been appointed to the Supreme Court of the United States.
>
> They didn't care about his deeply partisan background, working for George W. Bush during the Florida recount. They didn't care about his reference to birth control as "abortion-inducing drugs." And they **clearly** didn't care about Dr. Christine Blasey Ford's credible allegations of sexual assault.
>
> We can never count on a Republican majority to do the right thing. So let's do something about it. [**Please donate to help our fight to flip the House in 30 days >>**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?refcode=RTW_181008_Kavanaugh_EM&&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
>
> The first step to holding the President, Brett Kavanaugh, Mitch McConnell, and the rest of the Republicans in Washington accountable is to take back the House. That's why I've been helping seven Democratic challengers all across our state for the past months.
>
> I've been mad since three million Americans were left voiceless in 2016. But what I'm feeling now, I haven't felt since that night in early November. This is NOT normal. [**I 'm determined to turn my anger into action. Will you join me?**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?refcode=RTW_181008_Kavanaugh_EM&&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
>
> If you're afraid that Brett Kavanaugh will rule against the environment, against our future and that of our children, then I need you with me.
>
> If you're afraid that Brett Kavanaugh will rule for the big financial companies over all of us, I need you with me.
>
> If you're afraid Brett Kavanaugh will rule against victims of domestic assault, I need you to keep standing with me.
>
> If you're afraid Brett Kavanaugh will rule against the Affordable Care Act, against Roe v. Wade, against everything that you and I hold dear, [**then I need your support so I can continue to aid remarkable Democratic challengers in California that will help us flip the House >>**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_181007_ls_house?refcode=RTW_181008_Kavanaugh_EM&&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
>
> It's more important now than ever. Let's do this, together.
>
> -Linda
| **Rep. Linda S anchez proudly serves the 38th District of California. She is the fifth-highest ranking member of Leadership as the Vice Chair of the House Democratic Caucus and is the highest-ranking Latina in Congress. As a mother, union member, and progressive, Linda will always fight for America's working families.** **[CONTRIBUTE](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_181008_Kavanaugh_EM&&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
---

You can contribute to The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez by [**donating here.**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036686/4ac3d62d/6a29824f/1ce2946f/3760940594/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ls_support?refcode=footer&amount=25.00&recurring=auto")
Contributions or gifts to The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez are not tax deductible.

You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. Still support Linda but want fewer emails? **[Go here](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036686/4ac3d62d/6a29824f/1ce2946c/3760940594/VEsO/ "https://secure.voteforlinda.com/page/signup/linda-sanchez-lite")** to sign up to receive less email from our campaign. [**Click here**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036686/4ac3d62d/6a29824f/1ce2946d/3760940594/VEsP/ "http://ca.voteforlinda.com/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages and enter dpwillis67@gmail.com so we can unsubscribe you from our list.

Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
PO Box 59660
Norwalk, CA 90652
---

name: Team Inslee
subject: IMPORTANT VOTER REGISTRATION DEADLINE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Time's running out to register to vote.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b9e4/2f5ea88d/74ee744e/2cbc691d/4263880518/VEsH/ "https://weiapplets.sos.wa.gov/MyVote/#/login") Friend, **Have you registered to vote yet?** _If not, time is running out._ **The deadline for mail-in and online voter registration is _TO DAY, October 8._** [**You can register to vote by visiting the Washington Secretary of State website.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b9e4/2f5ea88d/74ee744e/2cbc691d/4263880518/VEsE/ "https://weiapplets.sos.wa.gov/MyVote/#/login") _Please, don't delay or wait until it's too late._ Jay is counting on Democrats turning out in record numbers this November if we're going to take back Congress, hold the state legislature, and elect strong progressives up and down the ballot. [**Remember, the online voter registration deadline is this TODAY, October 8. You can register right here, right now -- it only takes a minute!**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b9e4/2f5ea88d/74ee744e/2cbc691d/4263880518/VEsF/ "https://weiapplets.sos.wa.gov/MyVote/#/login") | [REGISTER TO VOTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7b9e4/2f5ea88d/74ee744e/2cbc691d/4263880518/VEsC/ "https://weiapplets.sos.wa.gov/MyVote/#/login")

Thanks for taking the time to register to vote. The right to vote is the cornerstone of our democracy.
Team Inslee
P.S. Please forward this email to anyone who might need the reminder today!

name: Team Molly
subject: First ad of the general election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
[](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a02/d0ce7de/5047c6ff/9cd96b1/1608703663/VEsH/ "http://www.mollykelly.com")
[](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a02/d0ce7de/5047c6ff/9cd96b1/1608703663/VEsE/ "http://www.mollykelly.com")
Exciting news, friends!
We just launched our first TV ad of the general election about one of the most important issues to Molly: paid family and medical leave.

**[](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a02/d0ce7de/5047c6ff/9cd96b0/1608703663/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHktZmFtaWxpZXMtYWQiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azIwMy1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kelly-families-ad?refcode=jtk203-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

Chris Sununu, like a typical politician, broke his promise and stopped paid leave for New Hampshire's working families from becoming law, calling it "vacation." But Molly knows the struggles families face, because she lived them. She knows paid family leave is about being with a newborn, caring for a parent or being there for a sick child.
**New Hampshire needs a governor who actually understands the issues that our working families face and can be counted on to go to bat for them every time. That's Molly.**
****[Click here to watch the full ad.](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a02/d0ce7de/5047c6ff/9cd96b0/1608703663/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHktZmFtaWxpZXMtYWQiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azIwMy1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kelly-families-ad?refcode=jtk203-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****
Thank you for your support,
Team Molly
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Supporters of Molly Kelly email list, please click here.](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a02/d0ce7de/5047c6ff/9cd96bf/1608703663/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://mollykelly.bsd.net/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly. Debby Butler, Fiscal Agent

name: Joshua Karp, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: Hey, this is our chance
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3683/9e00690/519f53a7/24019d8d/4112886148/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181009_Palatk_fnd_gq_nono_resend__ZL_ettx&source=em18_181009_Palatk_fnd_gq_nono_resend__ZL_ettx")
Friends,

Mayor Andrew Gillum is running the most unapologetically progressive campaign in Florida's history -- and folks across the state and country are taking notice.

Earlier this month, Mayor Gillum packed an auditorium in Palatka, Florida -- which only has a population of just over 10,000 and is in a county Donald Trump won by 36% in 2016.

And then, President Barack Obama endorsed our campaign, saying Mayor Gillum "is a proven fighter with the courage and determination" to stand up for all Floridians.

The momentum is on our side -- just look at this picture from Palatka -- but we need your help to let every voter in Florida know that Mayor Gillum will lead our state forward. **[Can we count on you to chip in $5 or more to help us get out the vote in the final weeks before Election Day?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3683/9e00690/519f53a7/24019d85/4112886148/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-october-2018?gpsid=13_55_4094&refcode=em18_181009_Palatk_fnd_gq_nono_resend__ZL_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181009_Palatk_fnd_gq_nono_resend__ZL_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=9+-+Can+we+count+on+you+to+chip+in++ask++or+")**

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3683/9e00690/519f53a7/24019d84/4112886148/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-october-2018?gpsid=13_55_4094&refcode=em18_181009_Palatk_fnd_gq_nono_resend__ZL_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181009_Palatk_fnd_gq_nono_resend__ZL_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=10")
As Governor, Mayor Gillum will fight to make healthcare a right, not a privilege, invest in our children's education, and protect the environment for future generations of Floridians. And over the next 29 days, we'll be talking to voters across the state to make sure they know it.

**[This is our chance to elect a Governor who will put everyday people first again -- but we need your help to bring it home on Tuesday, November 6. So please, chip in $5 now and let's keep the momentum going.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3683/9e00690/519f53a7/24019d87/4112886148/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-october-2018?gpsid=13_55_4094&refcode=em18_181009_Palatk_fnd_gq_nono_resend__ZL_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181009_Palatk_fnd_gq_nono_resend__ZL_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=11+-+This+is+our+chance+to+elect+a+Governor+w")**

Bring it home,

Joshua Karp
Deputy Campaign Manager
Andrew Gillum for Governor

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3683/9e00690/519f53a7/24019d86/4112886148/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-october-2018?gpsid=13_55_4094&refcode=em18_181009_Palatk_fnd_gq_nono_resend__ZL_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181009_Palatk_fnd_gq_nono_resend__ZL_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=12+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

240 N. Magnolia Drive
Tallahassee, FL 32301

name: Deborah Parker, Our Revolution
subject: This Indigenous Peoples' Day, help elect the first ever Indigenous governor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
This Indigenous Peoples' Day, I think back to my ancestors - the many great men and women who have been influential throughout my life.
#
Friends,
This Indigenous Peoples' Day, I think back to my ancestors - the many great men and women who have been influential throughout my life. I think back to the role models, the leaders, the fearless who showed us why we must fight to preserve our homelands, waterways and sacred way of life. We learned the importance of working as one.
Paulette Jordan is one of these fearless leaders. As a proud member of the Coeur d'Alene tribe, she too was raised to fight for the needs of her community and to protect our priceless natural resources.
**This November, we can make history by electing Paulette Jordan as the first Indigenous governor in the United States.**
This election is about changing the decades-long status quo that pre-selects who can run for office. Our Revolution is replacing this status quo with bold, progressive leadership led by people. Paulette isn't afraid to stand up for working families, environmental conservation, Medicare for All, and more. **In Idaho, Our Revolution has endorsed Proposition 2 to expand Medicaid to 62,000 uninsured people.**
[**Will you help Paulette Jordan's campaign make history and win Medicaid expansion across Idaho? Make a $5 contribution today to help get out the vote in the last 29 days of this critical election.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a8f9/bed43eb/7184f19c/75fced91/3745283412/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-jordan?refcode=em181008-full&noskip=true")
For decades, states like Idaho have been written off by national Democrats as too "red" to win. Now is the time to break the mold, to lead with our ideas, and to empower the grassroots to fight for our communities. And in this election, where we can make history, where health care is at the forefront of public debate, we can win.
Paulette Jordan's candidacy is about more than being elected governor of Idaho. It is about showing this country that every voice and every contribution matters, regardless of where you were born or who your family is.
[**Help Paulette Jordan make history and expand Medicaid to 62,000 Idahoans. Chip in $5 today.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a8f9/bed43eb/7184f19c/75fced91/3745283412/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-jordan?refcode=em181008-full&noskip=true")
t'igwicid--thank you,
Deborah Parker, (Tulalip)
Board Vice-Chair
Our Revolution
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a8f9/bed43eb/7184f19c/75fced91/3745283412/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-jordan?refcode=em181008-full&noskip=true")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035

If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a8f9/bed43eb/7184f19c/75fced90/3745283412/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a8f9/bed43eb/7184f19c/75fced93/3745283412/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a8f9/bed43eb/7184f19c/75fced92/3745283412/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a8f9/bed43eb/7184f19c/75fced9d/3745283412/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Jeff
subject: RE: One week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Denham for Congress
body:
The day has arrived! Absentee ballots are being mailed and voting has begun across the 10th District.
Friend,

I wanted to make sure you saw my email earlier last week about voting early.

The day has arrived! Absentee ballots are being mailed and voting has begun across the 10th District.

As thousands of Valley voters begin to lock in their votes, I’m reminded of what an honor it is to be a part of our nation’s great electoral process.

But as voters start to cast their ballots, time is running out. The election is only 29 days away, and voters are making their decisions NOW.

I need to make sure that my message is reaching voters before they cast their ballots. That means picking up the pace. We need to make sure our ads are reaching every voter on TV, radio, and digital. We need to make sure our volunteers have the resources they need to knock on every door they can, and we don’t have any time to waste.

But friend, according to my finance team, to do all that we need to raise another $38,147 by the end of this week. I’ve asked them to set up an emergency fund to raise the money at the link below.
[CONTRIBUTE TO JEFF'S EMERGENCY FUND](http://links.jeffdenham.com/u/click?_t=ae4e127997b64fdfa10e37f90fe2a78d&_m=af27176330f74e75bc039d54067f9f12&_e=5aPPQTCUVjQrMBHY-3gpwu_nStvcrfU6IDizWYxIncL_slcdeh7_kxSsHRg61ok7M24j8oD1MV5FMpa7WauVtCG9KynOh4xkMy9_p96JkL5BMpVQytAn04rophILiDaGnwj9zycKh1mOlFDLzlBvu9oVa_RspRobQIEtxBUckd0y3MuRsvWUaYVho00jGhvjJ9NlB-sidFpgQDiOOg0R_EQx1omg2FNejRvLtHyNavL5dYmPupbgQlOeowRnEvy6ismonqkvrMwXzEbzd_uznphIrSBB-wEsnOY-WG9ef3VPLLDDD08hIGEuN-hI-9rgnZibjm-GOPnelSa2VZKNf13AkfxH6cWD2_0473kogeLqXjp6sluRn2wmk8ImyCQaHsgKRupg0BBIWokNhII6UQ%3D%3D)
---

[**Will you considering chipping in $25 to help us reach our goal? **](http://links.jeffdenham.com/u/click?_t=ae4e127997b64fdfa10e37f90fe2a78d&_m=af27176330f74e75bc039d54067f9f12&_e=5aPPQTCUVjQrMBHY-3gpwu_nStvcrfU6IDizWYxIncL8H1z8ZRs2CfE3i-GAA7-_MUxjcQYZ_EGvP5Lho_Hi1_56e3g3aUorn8pUZwlAL8kHNrvUqpJxe9bvjCcgZR0tkpajhSimNEYTYVqqX3-2MvgzbQjFUiPW6EUOPH8Y-FEuYk23dKptHlqv5Uk5V081usqO9umk-hd_T4DjqgLdlWBjIDG7iX2W_Dr7uiCChZ6YI2ANm31IjL4QJYiifK0eYprIUs_wT0I8AhvpHu52P3WmdI6LGNBrPfaepyQlVYYagPRhWZQBXNGKmb2JvLfhS8yBsYDmv8ontbyUKN-DzTEphV4r0W2uQKK5ySgYpGVKgUaGUqyvAtg4OUc5edv_xsVwcL9LRqE4QdHjQFfUKZTNoHFfbnXg5RdeI4yWLgM%3D)

I don’t make this request lightly, but if we don’t act now we leave the Valley vulnerable to the Bay Area liberals’ “blue wave” - and I won’t let that happen.

I hope you’ll join me today to defend our home.

-Jeff

\-----Forwarded Message Below-----

Friend,

In one week, voting will begin throughout California ahead of this year’s general election.

It’s hard to believe that we’re already here. In just 7 days, Valley voters will begin casting their ballots in this year’s general election.

Once again, we have the chance to prove that Valley values are stronger than the liberal elitists from the Bay Area.

But, friend, my opponent has the help of Nancy Pelosi and her Bay Area liberal donors. They’re throwing everything they’ve got into making the Valley a part of their so-called “Blue Wave.”

We can’t let that happen.

We have 7 days before voters start locking in their votes, which means we have to act NOW. We have to spread our message before they fill out their ballots.

clean_body: The day has arrived! Absentee ballots are being mailed and voting has begun across the 10th District. Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw my email earlier last week about voting early. The day has arrived! Absentee ballots are being mailed and voting has begun across the 10th District. As thousands of Valley voters begin to lock in their votes, I’m reminded of what an honor it is to be a part of our nation’s great electoral process. But as voters start to cast their ballots, time is running out. The election is only 29 days away, and voters are making their decisions NOW. I need to make sure that my message is reaching voters before they cast their ballots. That means picking up the pace. We need to make sure our ads are reaching every voter on TV, radio, and digital. We need to make sure our volunteers have the resources they need to knock on every door they can, and we don’t have any time to waste. But friend, according to my finance team, to do all that we need to raise another $38,147 by the end of this week. I’ve asked them to set up an emergency fund to raise the money at the link below. I don’t make this request lightly, but if we don’t act now we leave the Valley vulnerable to the Bay Area liberals’ “blue wave” - and I won’t let that happen. I hope you’ll join me today to defend our home. -Jeff \-----Forwarded Message Below----- Friend, In one week, voting will begin throughout California ahead of this year’s general election. It’s hard to believe that we’re already here. In just 7 days, Valley voters will begin casting their ballots in this year’s general election. Once again, we have the chance to prove that Valley values are stronger than the liberal elitists from the Bay Area. But, friend, my opponent has the help of Nancy Pelosi and her Bay Area liberal donors. They’re throwing everything they’ve got into making the Valley a part of their so-called “Blue Wave.” We can’t let that happen. We have 7 days before voters start locking in their votes, which means we have to act NOW. We have to spread our message before they fill out their ballots. I can’t thank you enough, Friend. Jeff Paid for by Denham for Congress

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=dda4faf9daa44d8ca6544aa2f604cc65&_e=dBSfQVs-UnpKdgoX-6uyrS4qth21J5QyeWuGIyxtLT7bIVDKV8pX1FawAL071CKRmSUxIDbgqMJH9gOs4MKIWBinW1Nqcdxk5079j_Gvr9n7xPG2ETBcghPuABS5c5M_Wy70xcsqNyGW8tVG7iZOfCK4F4kQYAR13JEGINbqH2A_iPXMoggQuJBuDIY2w8XYwOsQ7JmVPvdVBG3D5diy75iNkSjEW9znNrh4oGQYeDizAKA9g6dgOCotqZaeA8TM). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=dda4faf9daa44d8ca6544aa2f604cc65&_e=4XVtUaL_bXYUcV8qzCU2DTUzEyzvCeXlTShMZwtRNUKcJ7pT8ul718xINoZia26N6PAHjt6yU29LJjHgT06cXk84yNTl4ZUTQn-ei9V41Nz5DZ5qx_TQvzxPLA_sHK8OiA1Om_QteKY47GprCCQSRV0ZJ_clVKv6Q7LbNmhHf-kfEI7LmUJxyWE4YbFEVImyOYkCtUXU3RBJZQ3dxggEacmvtoLaoubfVGOc4XGw6gDbsR1VISghqNH1I98rR1yDHMi_TiKTKZ4gGYFW7_SImzwQ5C8n1HMyLx61wndpYgIbdMrQKTYnagXfU63mylgUX6MaEEg2YnzYbzKgiZlcPI8bKGdJpon-Cr4fGR-ntClSvNH99rPVrSmcZG4tQiMy) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=dda4faf9daa44d8ca6544aa2f604cc65&_e=4XVtUaL_bXYUcV8qzCU2DTUzEyzvCeXlTShMZwtRNULEqEEFYdxyeggeVIK1G52TcB7qamj_swHLIdbridEoF3e99dv2Ps4cFq7vmT90Flmj7qiQk3wl_SqfJ5ozyC_8EbHz_GmlTBr7UudvBskT9zqsVtFn1RKuys73MlA92XypXsXojgCxyJZQFwY50_GRRHf8tT8YOrHh28E4UHEp97pAnaE6Z75qJPvuGLRLunygr4EJ8UNqIgWe6gbAY62tTfgj7O0zSMqX3G0D3SkcLBamQ9OJo_0g_as24AzQF7NdruEOehxAAJQcWkRG3XmQpe1SIF3278Fz_TuBbOArvhjej8x9mSY7D3xWEhR9W02KIXFeqEW7MhPzhYpCVs_T) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=dda4faf9daa44d8ca6544aa2f604cc65&_e=4XVtUaL_bXYUcV8qzCU2DZzVLIhuL_PIo2YkmAQnOaXJl01D9fsMOX5Ug7R6g8Ums5MdZS9gxniScL2GnHc9l6JCRMrkD8uhKObhg3nVaNLzc72tql_cRfDuzA7l5O2vuBLU8Sh-GlEpBoP1nGdNj8ZHEmQguFWBvPnyWCPC6DlUsqPlCbCGlFsYcn2Hi3oACwkgZUQ7efOzgqkUdvtO-TbLFJa748a7Qi7tyUchDmfNNA7D6HeB4UQ8-HapBAr63v-GgOUngsgzVzn49mzZSg%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=dda4faf9daa44d8ca6544aa2f604cc65&_e=4XVtUaL_bXYUcV8qzCU2DSBTxgx1K7V3_uve2ml4kuYUzk_jeMyMJRMjxlMf1py7uMfWKliUBVlzXpoosZVYDkadsNQJhCcL4g2jX4Fg8EFQDRL357OEljRBxCRvy5Pw4dvbx2PRLiBgkKK-6dccIdW3IJYsKRDV1Q7EWTayIX05foZiCWMV5WV6e65jCiUfQYDjS0ke7mZunnRnXIPiGdizqyrNxP45fiKJhvnJrXcrIUOXhUwMSzGIKvb8CkcvB8Os2fKuCrRi4ZR5LxUung%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=dda4faf9daa44d8ca6544aa2f604cc65&_e=4XVtUaL_bXYUcV8qzCU2DWkd7XA73bNEF7ztBo90GFxLtBh-ayAbYeN-p_s8coxM-mB8-AKe1BnCJ3NsVoLeizfPoLPz24uAtPbpotW2v7XpeyBmPflNYK8taVhMXnbbNHR8_DXT9DAwGlEAFEzaZFfFu7ZwDWkJK1KDVlkYkHqGOhTBVzyT36vq1KHFUxjgjIn5H627wk6eG7FU9s_jOejQU33W_kG6qUYDMwmEhsWvZW7DKr31elT_0g0p2q2q4WADucZs7rgcTCUG4dbl_A%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=dda4faf9daa44d8ca6544aa2f604cc65&_e=4XVtUaL_bXYUcV8qzCU2DTUzEyzvCeXlTShMZwtRNUJN6BVfSomSeZQ1rg4rfidzlCe4-auo13wCyxQ1Denu2LALUvFtnLoOo1CeMiKKTtUvDt4JJm9-sKV94q8acL1z9siBU2H-VhnL6UPVssOYckg4UoINoDKUBy3wH-8s7RqZ2LbZ3wXvK9Ck8BoJ0AKG9jtMoD92GR3GQrbrfm4yQIDsSCI6v1Lbij8O9ONqBIh79SvnHyrQ77LpN2cDB7K6iLkcwSE_LBDydWzagh8JtEvlDVHFPpeL36K1wKaVOCGkwdwvRwnYNsywGpnv-C5b9MuO8eCpY-05pBQ0ZezbiRQehgUpqZTKZQY9yT9hw8tVHTkt1CBuu4tBWRRdv98c-jzOITS8u13qe_zWmm56dg%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=dda4faf9daa44d8ca6544aa2f604cc65&_e=dBSfQVs-UnpKdgoX-6uyrS4qth21J5QyeWuGIyxtLT7bIVDKV8pX1FawAL071CKRmSUxIDbgqMJH9gOs4MKIWBinW1Nqcdxk5079j_Gvr9n7xPG2ETBcghPuABS5c5M_Wy70xcsqNyGW8tVG7iZOfCK4F4kQYAR13JEGINbqH2A_iPXMoggQuJBuDIY2w8XYwOsQ7JmVPvdVBG3D5diy75iNkSjEW9znNrh4oGQYeDizAKA9g6dgOCotqZaeA8TM) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=dda4faf9daa44d8ca6544aa2f604cc65&_e=dBSfQVs-UnpKdgoX-6uyrS4qth21J5QyeWuGIyxtLT7bIVDKV8pX1FawAL071CKRmSUxIDbgqMJH9gOs4MKIWBinW1Nqcdxk5079j_Gvr9n7xPG2ETBcghPuABS5c5M_Wy70xcsqNyGW8tVG7iZOfCK4F4kQYAR13JEGINbqH2A_iPXMoggQuJBuDIY2w8XYwOsQ7JmVPvdVBG3D5diy75iNkSjEW9znNrh4oGQYeDizAKA9g6dgOCotqZaeA8TM) to unsubscribe. body:

That means we're just days away from President Trump attacking Bob right here in Pennsylvania. He's headlining a rally on Wednesday for Bob's opponent, Congressman Lou Barletta -- the last time he campaigned with Barletta, they raised an estimated _one million dollars_.

**_[Donate $5 or more today to make sure Bob is ready to push back against the president's attacks.](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181008_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Last week the _Washington Post_ reported that Lou Barletta has received more support from President Trump than any other candidate running for Congress this year. clean_body: "" (null) -- it's almost Wednesday. That means we're just days away from President Trump attacking Bob right here in Pennsylvania. He's headlining a rally on Wednesday for Bob's opponent, Congressman Lou Barletta -- the last time he campaigned with Barletta, they raised an estimated one million dollars. "" Last week the Washington Post reported that Lou Barletta has received more support from President Trump than any other candidate running for Congress this year. Trump's motives are clear -- he wants another ally to help pass his dangerous, divisive agenda that has hurt middle-class Pennsylvanians already. There are only a few days to prepare for the president's arrival in Erie, and we still need to raise $25,450 before Wednesday. Can you help close the gap by donating $5 or more to protect Bob today?
